title: ReleaseReceipt
description: A verified release record carrying artifact hashes, gate check results, and an overall release status for a specific release target.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

releaseTarget.description: The identifier of the release target (e.g. "v2.0.0", "staging", "production").

sourceRef.description: Optional reference to the source commit, tag, or artifact set.

artifactHashes.description: sha256: prefixed hashes of all artifacts included in this release.

checks.description: Identifiers of the gate checks that were run (e.g. "unit-tests", "schema-lint", "security-scan").

status.description: Overall release status: verified (all checks passed), failed (at least one check failed), or partial.

verifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the release was verified.
